title: Online Consent Status
description: Status of the online consent request sent to the designated contact.

x-enumDescriptions.Accepted: The online consent request has been successfully accepted by the designated contact.
x-enumDescriptions.Expired: The online consent request has expired and is no longer valid.
x-enumDescriptions.Not Applicable: The online consent request is not applicable to the current situation or context.
x-enumDescriptions.Not Requested: The online consent request has not been sent to the designated contact.
x-enumDescriptions.Refused: The online consent request has been refused by the designated contact.
x-enumDescriptions.Requested: The online consent request has been sent to the designated contact, but the status is pending.
